Title: Species Recovery Grants to States
Notes: Formula grants to states for ESA-listed species. Not on Grants.gov. Watch page directly.

Title: Saltonstall-Kennedy Grant Program
Notes: Annual competitive grants for fishing community benefit. Does post on Grants.gov but worth watching directly.

Title: John H. Prescott Marine Mammal Rescue Assistance Grant
Notes: Grants for marine mammal rescue networks. State/nonprofit eligible.

Title: Coastal and Marine Habitat Restoration Grants
Notes: Habitat restoration under Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. Multiple rounds.

Title: Bycatch Reduction Engineering Program
Notes: Competitive grants for gear modification and bycatch reduction research.

Title: Sea Grant Omnibus
Notes: Major Sea Grant research cycle. Watch seagrant.noaa.gov directly — not always on Grants.gov early.

Title: Marine Fisheries Initiative (MARFIN)
Notes: Southeast-focused but worth watching for methods/modeling work.

Title: National Marine Aquaculture Initiative
Notes: Competitive aquaculture research grants through Sea Grant network.

Title: Climate Program Office Grants
Notes: CPO posts solicitations separately from main Grants.gov. Watch CPO page.

Title: Ocean Acidification Program
Notes: Competitive grants for OA research. Posts on Grants.gov but worth watching directly.

Title: Greater Atlantic Region Funding Opportunities
Notes: Regional announcements for NE/Mid-Atlantic. Check quarterly.
